name: Italian Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Cream butter and shortening until smooth.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each.
5. Mix flour and baking soda separately.
6. Alternate adding the flour mixture with buttermilk to the creamed mixture.
7. Stir in vanilla.
8. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
9. Pour batter into 3 greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Cool.
ICING:
1. Soften cream cheese and butter together until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, stirring after each addition.
3. Add water and vanilla, beating until well combined.
4. Spread icing between layers and over top and sides of cake.
5. Sprinkle chopped pecans on the top for garnish.
NOTE: For enhanced flavor, consider adding additional coconut and pecans between the cake layers.
